title: James Brett 100% Acrylic Baby Double Knitting Yarn Supersoft DK Knit Wool 5 x 100g (White - BB4)
features: This is a super soft baby arcylic yarn.
It can be machine washed at 40c and comes in a wide range of traditional and contemporary shade range.
It knits to a tension of 22 sts x 28 rows = 10cm x 10cm (4" x 4") and its recommended needle size is 4mm.
This baby wool is a good seller since it is a DK plus 100% acrylic and gentle on your new-born’s tender skin.
Please note that the colours shown may differ slightly from the actual product depending on the computer monitors and hardware colour profiles.
description: This baby double knitting wool is manufactured by James C Brett yarn merchants. Made from 100% super soft acrylic this wool is fantastic for designing pullovers, cardigans, blankets, socks and all your baby needs. Available as a single 100g ball or as a pack of 5 or 10, with each ball having approximately 268 metres / 293 yards of yarn. This wool is available in the following shades: Mint Green (BB1), Lemon Yellow (BB2), Lilac (BB3), White (BB4), Blue (BB5), Baby Pink (BB6), Pale Pink (BB8), Cream (BB9), Grey (BB11) or Aqua (BB12). Machine washable at 40c, this wool should not be tumble dried or ironed. This yarn's stated tension is 22 stitches to 30 rows over 10cm x 10cm (4" x 4"). Needles of size 4mm (UK 8 - USA 6) can be used. You will love this yarns super soft feel and the colours and might end up knitting a cardigan for your baby and one for yourself! Please note all photographs are for illustrative purposes and shades may vary, all measurements are approximate. This super soft baby arcylic yarn. It is a DK plus 100% acrylic and gentle on your new-born’s tender skin. Colour:White Size:100g Ball - 290m / 317 yards - available to purchase singularly or in packs of 5 and 10. Material:Acrylic Care Instructions:Machine wash 40c, do not iron or tumble dry. Recommended Needles:4mm (UK 8 – USA 6) Manufacturer:James Brett
